dialogos.texto_en: Look, Raiha!\nHere's the big tank you've been waiting for!
Wowww...\nThere's really a tank this big...
I can't believe it myself...
Oh! There's a big one!\nIs that the whale shark?!
Oh wow!\nThere it is! It's so big!
But it's a bit far away, isn't it?
I hope it comes closer.
It seems to be swimming around in circles,\nso if we wait, it might come closer.
There are many other rare fish here too.\nLet's watch them and wait.
Oh! That one's a stingray, right?\nIt's big too!
It looks like a cushion.\nIt would be fun to sit on it\nand take a walk in the ocean.
That's a manta ray, right?\nOr, it might be easier to just call it a 'manta.'
Ah...
What?\nYou've heard of a manta before, right?
Hee-hee.\nUesugi-san, you know so much!
Hey, Futaro-kun.\nYou're still going to be\nin the aquarium for a while, right?
Yeah, that's the plan. Is there something wrong?
I'm tired, so I'm going to take a break.\nThere seems to be a place where we can sit down\nand watch the tanks, so I'll rest there for a bit.
Don't take a nap while you're resting, okay?
I'd be happy if you could come get me\nwhen it's time to move.
I can't just leave you behind.\nIt'll be a hassle, but I'll come get you.
Thank you.\nWell then, Futaro-kun, be strong.
Wha...?
(Be strong? Regarding what?)
Ah! Uesugi-san!\nThe whale shark is coming this way!
Ohhh, when did it get here?!\nIt's even bigger up close.
Yeah. It really has such a big impact.
Look at that mouth.\nIt would be so scary\nto meet something like that in the ocean.
Waaah?!\nIt might swallow you up.
Hey, Fu%p-2;――
Nino?\nCan I talk to you?
Eh, Ichika?\nWhat the, where are you taking me%p-2;――
What's up?
I feel like I just heard someone call my name...
Huh, where did Raiha go?\nThe whale shark is swimming in front of us!
She went to see the large tank from the upper deck\nwith Itsuki.
Oh, I see.\nSo it's just you and me, Yotsuba.
Ah...\nIt does seem that way, doesn't it.
Y-yeah.\nThose guys are all so selfish.
(I was so focused on the whale shark\n that I didn't notice,\n but Yotsuba is surprisingly close by...)
Wh-what do you wanna do?\nYou and I%p-2;――
Nah, it's nothing.\nLet's watch a little longer from here.
...Okay.
(Things...feel nice here, don't they? Just now,\n it looked like we just linked arms by chance.\n Unfortunately, the awkwardness hasn't gone away...)
(Ichika said she's resting somewhere else,\n and Raiha and Itsuki went to another place.\n I don't see Nino or Miku nearby.)
(Could this be my chance?\n If I properly link arms with Yotsuba this time!)
Y-Yotsuba.
Yes?
(Yotsuba must be waiting, hoping for this.\n I can't disappoint her.)
(Casually linking arms...)
...Um, Uesugi-san?
H-hey, over there...um...
Look, over there!\nIt's a school of giant trevallies!\nWow, they're amazing!
Out of everything here,\nwhy talk about the TREVALLIES?!
UWAAH?! N-Nino?
Huh?
Ah...
I'm sorry!\nPlease don't mind us, you guys can continue as is,\nUesugi-kun.
Come on, Nino, let's go quickly!
(...They were definitely watching us, huh.)
(In the end, I missed my chance\n to link arms with Yotsuba,\n and our aquarium visit came to an end...)
